title: ACTUS Standard Overview
description: High-level introduction to the ACTUS standard, contract taxonomy, and the financial contract representation model.

title: Hackathon Presentation Slides
description: Slide deck from the GPU-accelerated ACTUS hackathon — problem statement, solution design, architecture, and benchmark results.

title: GPU Architecture Diagram
description: Full-resolution architecture diagram of the GPU compute pipeline — kernel layout, data structures, and executor flow.

title: Live Demo Recording
description: Screen recording of the web-based scenario demo running PAM contracts with live risk factor injection.

title: PAM Test Data (Excel)
description: All 42 PAM test cases in an Excel workbook — input terms, expected cash flows, and state vectors per event type.
